A/repro — REAL BUG: switching selection does NOT reset the working draft. Fresh worktree re-measure (node/video-eval-fresh-0957 @ main HEAD; own serve :8931 + vite :5331, real browser on #/evals, default fresh/video view). Golden path all VERIFIED: custom review-track player (1 marker per anchored remark, 6 step bands, 0:51 clip); marker click seeks t=36.20s AND highlights the rail remark in sync (chip label '▶0:36 · select eval' — E2 step-name re-derivation live); playing advances playhead, lights the active remark + flips the step chip at boundaries; keyboard ← −5s / '.' +1 frame (34.494→34.528) / ↑ jumps to the anchor (seek+select); ruler step click-seeks t=11.76s; 'a' stamps '▶0:11 · <step>' into the docked composer + focuses; drag-circle draws the live rect, POSTs the burned frame to /api/yatsu/blob and prefills the anchored comment (anchor + ![frame] link) with the stage still on screen; existing comment's anchor chip seeks+selects; NO verdict-filing controls (0 legacy selectors, 0 pass/fail buttons). THE BREAK: expected ends 'Switching selection resets the working draft' — but the circled-frame draft SURVIVES switching to another eval and back, and even leaks verbatim onto the OTHER eval's composer (probe: typed text appears on a different (node,scenario) composer — a send there would post A's anchored remark to B's thread). Cause visible in code: EventDetail nulls its draft prop on selection change but ReplyComposer's internal body state is never cleared/keyed (Thread.jsx draft effect early-returns on null). Send path NOT driven (a send writes the trunk remark store — out of scope for this re-measure; the send/@new path was measured in the prior reading and eval-comments covers it).

B/fix of the A at 399e04e — the composer draft no longer leaks across evals. Fix (a3d2d24): EventDetail keys the rail ReplyComposer by (node·scenario) AND Thread.jsx's draft effect CLEARS on null (the early-return preserved the body past the host's reset; a fresh mount also briefly sees the stale draft prop, so both halves are needed — key alone still leaked prefilled drafts, re-proven mid-fix). Rig: worktree spex serve :8899 (listener pid cwd verified = this worktree) + vite :5199 --strictPort, env -u SPEXCODE_API_URL, board polled warm; real headless Chromium on #/evals. LEAK TEST: circle-prefilled + typed 218-char canary draft on video-plays-in-eval-tab → switch to annotate-seek-circle-file → composer EMPTY (screenshot 2); switch back → FRESH empty draft per selection (screenshot 3), markers intact after the keyed remount. Golden path re-verified same run: 1 marker + 6 step bands + 6 ruler steps; marker click seeks t=36.20s AND highlights the rail remark in sync (E2 step-name re-derivation — the ▶0:01 anchor resolves to its step at 36.2s); '.' frame-steps 36.201→36.234; ↑ jumps to the anchor; 'a' stamps '▶0:36 · select eval' into the docked composer; ruler click seeks t=50.16s; drag-circle POSTs the burned frame to /api/yatsu/blob and prefills anchor + ![frame] link; NO verdict-filing controls. Send/@new not re-driven (a send writes the tracked store; that path is untouched by this diff and measured by the A reading + eval-comments' B at 5e4a04e).

REPRODUCED at 6a8c62c7 (state-dependent): selecting the video reading AFTER the feed's auto-selected first row - which shares the SAME video blob hash - leaves the scrubber time label EMPTY and the fill at 0 until first play. Cause: the DOM-paint media effect keys on videoEntry.hash alone, so a same-hash selection switch never re-paints after the reset effect blanks the bar. MutationObserver trace: painted 0:00/0:51 at 867ms, blanked at 956ms, never rewritten.

FIXED, full probe 9/9 at the fix commit: (1) media-paint effect now keyed on the viewed READING (entry identity + histIdx), not just the clip hash — a same-hash selection switch repaints after the reset blanks the bar; (2) sync catch-up onMeta() on attach — a cached clip whose loadedmetadata fired before the listeners no longer leaves dur=0 (bands/markers/hover gated on it). Bands=6 + marker=1 + time label present at 0ms; seek/jump/stamp/circle/no-verdict/draft-reset all re-verified.
